channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Warhammer Classics label announced, reviving and debuting classic games on Steam - Gematsu
item.description:
1. Warhammer Classics label announced, reviving and debuting classic games on Steam  Gematsu
  2. Warhammer Classics brings legendary games back to your PC  Warhammer Community
  3. Games Workshop brings seven classic Warhammer games to Steam for the first time  Engadget
  4. You Can Now Relive the Golden Age of ‘Warhammer’ PC Games  Gizmodo
  5. A Ton Of Warhammer Games Just Surprise-Dropped On Steam  GameSpot

item.title: Xbox boss reportedly says Game Pass "has become too expensive for players" - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. Xbox boss reportedly says Game Pass "has become too expensive for players"  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo  The Verge
  3. Xbox CEO called Game Pass 'too expensive for players' in a leaked memo  Engadget
  4. 6 months after hiking Game Pass prices by 50%, Xbox determines it may be too expensive  Sherwood News
  5. Microsoft considers lowering Xbox Game Pass, memo says: report  Seeking Alpha

item.title: Apple is making AI glasses, report claims - The Independent
item.description:
1. Apple is making AI glasses, report claims  The Independent
  2. Apple AI Glasses Will Rival Meta’s With Several Styles, Oval Cameras  Bloomberg.com
  3. Apple's AI smart glasses strategy revealed: How the iPhone maker plans to outshine Meta's Ray-Bans  Tom's Guide
  4. Apple Reportedly Testing AI Glasses in Several Frame Styles  CNET
  5. Will Apple’s Smart Glasses Come With a Ring Light Around the Camera?  PetaPixel

item.title: Apple Wallet keeps getting better, here’s what’s new and coming next - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. Apple Wallet keeps getting better, here’s what’s new and coming next  9to5Mac
  2. Apple Car Key Support Coming to Lexus Vehicles  MacRumors
  3. More major vehicle brands deliver Car Keys in Apple Wallet  MacDailyNews
  4. Toyota Brings Apple Car Key To The 2026 RAV4, With Lexus Support Expected Later  Ubergizmo
  5. Apple Wallet is quietly getting a massive upgrade - here's what's changing  Pocket-lint

item.title: Google gives Gemini a productivity boost with synced ‘Notebooks’ - Chrome Unboxed
item.description:
1. Google gives Gemini a productivity boost with synced ‘Notebooks’  Chrome Unboxed
  2. I replaced my notes app with Gemini’s new Notebooks — and I’m not going back  Tom's Guide
  3. Try notebooks in Gemini to easily keep track of projects  blog.google
  4. Gemini Gets New Notebooks Feature That Syncs With NotebookLM  CNET
  5. Gemini app rolling out ‘notebooks’ to organize chats & files, integrates with NotebookLM  9to5Google
